message:
So, there I was, enjoying a cozy evening at home, when suddenly—boom! The lights went out. Now, I like to think of myself as somewhat prepared, but that night, I found myself fumbling around for a flashlight like a raccoon in a trash can. I finally unearthed a flashlight that had seen better days—let’s just say it flickered like it was trying to signal an alien spaceship.

After a few moments of stumbling in the dark, I remembered my trusty power bank. Yes! I could keep my phone charged and maybe even find some entertainment. But then, I realized I had no snacks ready for a power outage. I mean, what’s a blackout without popcorn? 

The irony of my ‘preparedness’ hit me hard. I had all the gadgets, but no snacks and a flashlight that seemed to have a mind of its own. Lesson learned: it’s not just about having supplies, but knowing where they are and making sure they actually work!

Anyone else have a blackout comedy moment to share? This little refresher helped me get my act together!
